name: Buster Call
additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that lights a flare and highlights a large AoE on the ground. After a considerable delay, that location will be bombed several times, dealing very high damage. Cannot directly knock players. Applies burn on hit. 24 hour cooldown.
desc: Radio in the Authority's navy for a buster call, sending out a barrage of bombardment wherever you see fit.
